content_body:
Everything about this luxury cabin is just perfect. Thank you for opening up your home for us to enjoy. We needed a getaway from the city life and all its stresses, and your home provided the peace and relaxation we were seeking. The views are beyond amazing and even the rainy nights were magical.

We enjoy our Bible devotionals by the fire pit and making s'mores. God is so gracious to give us both creation and His Word to discover the many truths about Him. He gives us a beautiful sunset or paints a rainbow in the sky at just the right time to remind us of His power, love, and promises. Taking in the awesome beauty of creation and thanking my awesome Creator and Savior for His goodness, love, and rest we have so much enjoyed during our stay at the Rustice Elegance.

We look forward to coming back soon and making more memories here. God bless ~
title: Experiencing God's Amazing Grace in Blue Ridge
